creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Comment “Inn” and I’ll send you the link to this dreamy Winter Park stay ✨

If you’re looking for the perfect mix of luxury, art, and walkable charm, let me introduce you to The Alfond Inn in Winter Park, Florida 🤍

Located at 300 E New England Ave, Winter Park, FL 32789, this boutique hotel is truly something special. It’s owned by Rollins College and doubles as a curated art gallery, featuring pieces from The Alfond Collection of Contemporary Art throughout the property 🎨 Every hallway feels like a mini museum.

On site you’ll find:
A gorgeous rooftop pool with private cabanas 
A full-service spa for the ultimate relaxation day 
Hamilton’s Kitchen serving fresh, Florida-inspired cuisine (and yes… Carrot Top is known to stop by for breakfast, so you just might spot him 👀🥕)
Step outside and you’re instantly on Park Avenue with its brick-lined streets, upscale boutiques, sidewalk cafés, wine bars, and some of the most charming scenery in Central Florida 🌿🍷

You’re also just minutes from:

Rollins College
Scenic boat tours on the Winter Park Chain of Lakes
The Charles Hosmer Morse Museum
Easy access to Orlando while still feeling tucked away

It’s romantic, refined, and the perfect girls’ getaway or weekend escape.

Comment “Inn” and I’ll send you the direct link so you can plan your stay 💌✨
